languages.text: Wearer can pass through units, dealing {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} direct damage to them.

languages.text: Обладатель аугмента может проходить через позиции союзников и противников. Каждое существо на его пути получает {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Обладатель аугмента может проходить через позиции союзников и противников. Каждое существо на его пути получает {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента может проходить через позиции союзников и противников. Каждое существо на его пути получает {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

languages.text: El usuario puede moverse a través de aliados y enemigos por igual. Toda criatura que se interponga en su camino sufre {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: El usuario puede moverse a través de aliados y enemigos por igual. Toda criatura que se interponga en su camino sufre {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g}.

languages.text: Der Nutzer kann sich durch Gegner und Verbündete bewegen. Jede Kreatur auf seinem Weg erleidet {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Der Nutzer kann sich durch Gegner und Verbündete bewegen. Jede Kreatur auf seinem Weg erleidet {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, dostların ve düşmanların içinden ilerleyebilir. Yoluna çıkan her yaratık, {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasara{/g} maruz kalır.
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, dostların ve düşmanların içinden ilerleyebilir. Yoluna çıkan her yaratık, {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasara{/g} maruz kalır.

languages.text: L'utilisateur peut traverser alliés comme ennemis. Chaque créature sur sa trajectoire subit {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur peut traverser alliés comme ennemis. Chaque créature sur sa trajectoire subit {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g}.

languages.text: 使用者可穿过盟友和敌人移动。路径上的每个生物承受{uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 使用者可穿过盟友和敌人移动。路径上的每个生物承受{uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。

languages.text: 使用者は味方および敵を通り抜けて移動できる。その経路上の各ユニットは{uip|Damage|3a99ff1fc4d941fbbe9bb2820a1e6f55}の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を受ける。
